job_title: Data Warehouse/ ETL Tester- Healthcare OR "Health Payer" Experience is Mandatory
job_description:
# Data Warehouse/ ETL Tester- Healthcare OR "Health Payer" Experience is Mandatory
Company: Dotcom Team, LLC
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/e0faa112-4195-4b4c-b42b-5b2414b1bf54

## Highlights
- Remote data warehouse and ETL tester role with explicit healthcare or payer experience requirement.
- Posted 1 hour ago.
- Focuses on ETL/data warehouse validation, SQL, test cases, data validation, and healthcare-regulated data environments.
- Explicit payer requirement makes this one of the strongest keyword-aligned matches found today.
strengths: Explicit healthcare or payer experience requirement fits current background closely.
Excellent match on data warehouse QA, ETL testing, SQL validation, and test execution.
Direct overlap with claims/member/provider style validation work.
gaps: Cloud/AWS/Databricks exposure may still be preferred beyond current direct depth.
Third-party contract role rather than direct hire.
notes: Strongest new QA keyword hit from this rerun. Tailor toward payer data, ETL testing, data warehouse validation, SQL, reconciliation, and test case execution.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Data Warehouse QA Analyst | ETL Tester | Claims & Payer Data Validation

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and testing trusted enterprise data across payer-focused healthcare environments. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for healthcare payer ETL QA roles that require warehouse validation, business-rule testing, and reliable data reconciliation.

replacements.find: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts.
replacements.replace: Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—to standardize data warehouse QA and accelerate ETL validation readiness.
